description: A perfect way to rest your feet on those casual days is by slipping into these ultra cool and comfortable Danny puma slippers. With a funky print and comfortable footbed, this slipper makes for a great buy for the carefree minded. Upper Leather straps with a twill lining in a thong style, with a twill toe separator\ Padded footbed with funky print Outsole Durable rubber outsole with circular suction grooves throughout for enhanced grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
